title: "Notebook" Feature on Monday.com
excerpt: We would like a “notebook” feature for a user to informally record notes (perhaps in meetings etc.) without the need to format them in a board. These could then be moved to relevant boards, in the format of tasks or comm…

posts.author: hmortimer (Hannah Mortimer)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like a “notebook” feature for a user to informally record notes (perhaps in meetings etc.) without the need to format them in a board. These could then be moved to relevant boards, in the format of tasks or comments.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@hmortimer

Have you checked out monday workdocs: Introducing: monday workdocs!

That might be an answer for you.

Jim - Subscribe to The Monday Man

posts.cookedHtml:
maybe a long text column?
